$T0 >= 0
$T0 < 256
$T1 >= 0
$T1 < 4
$T2 >= 0
$WG0 >= 0
$WG1 >= 0
$GPR_NUM >= 0
M >= 1
N >= 1
K >= 1
_M_div_32 >= 0
_N_div_32 >= 0
_K_div_256 >= 0
$ARGK >= 0
$MMA_ACC >= 0
$MMA_LHS_SCALE >= 0
$MMA_RHS_SCALE >= 0
$MMA_SCALE_FP4 >= 0
$index0 >= 0
$index1 >= 0
_aligned >= 0
Mod(M, 32) == 0
Mod(N, 32) == 0
Mod(K, 256) == 0
BLOCK_K >= 1
